title: Number Widget's Opening Data it is Referencing
excerpt: When using a Number Widget, it would be helpful to be able to click into that number widget and see that data presented. For example, if I am counting the number of leads that came in on a specific date, or date range, a…

posts.author: ElizabethMonday (Elizabeth Sway)
posts.cookedHtml: When using a Number Widget, it would be helpful to be able to click into that number widget and see that data presented. For example, if I am counting the number of leads that came in on a specific date, or date range, and I click the number widget it would be ideal if a table with all the the leads in that range showed up instead of just the specific number. It would also take up less space on a dashboard rather than creating multiple tables that duplicate the Number Widget.

posts.author: BenATawardco (Benjamin Brown)
posts.cookedHtml: I would love to see this feature as well. We have a widget for upper management to see orders that are behind in production and it would be super helpful if they could click that number and then see the items that are behind schedule.
